subcodes.first_line: O Thou Beloved of My heart! In view of the multitude of writings and replies to petitions and missives from every quarter, there is no opportunity this time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی نظر بکثرت تحریر و جواب عرائض و نامهای اطراف مجال آنکه این کره
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
